scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ] && [ -n "$GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN" ]; then HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=3000 WDS_SOCKET_PROTOCOL=wss WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 WDS_SOCKET_HOST=$CODESPACE_NAME-3000.$GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN react-scripts start; else HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=3000 react-scripts start; fi'
